hooks.prompt: Advisory (non-blocking reminder): per the docs-before-code invariant, if this Grep/Glob targets an area covered by a resource_hint in METHODOLOGY.yaml (architecture, modules, build/test docs, API mappings, etc.), consider loading that doc first so the search runs with full context. This reminder fires on every Grep/Glob — ignore if you've already loaded relevant docs, or if no hint applies (e.g. validation, post-edit checks, exploring an unfamiliar repo).

Context is about to be compacted. Check: is there a Pith Framework project active in this session? If yes, has the session work been distilled (was /pith-consolidate run, or is CURRENT_STATUS up to date)? If undistilled work exists, warn: 'Session work has not been distilled. Consider running /pith-consolidate before continuing, or undistilled details may be lost after compaction.' Always allow compaction to proceed — this is a reminder, not a gate.
